author_identification.canonical_name_ar: الطبيب أبو حفص عمر بن الخضر بن اللمش
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Historian and physician known for his biographical work on the scholars of Denisr

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A biographical work focusing on the scholars and notables of Denisr, contributing to the broader genre of regional tabaqat literature
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Provides valuable insights into the intellectual and religious life of Denisr during the author's time
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Ibrahim Saleh is known for his careful editing and attention to detail in historical texts
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The editor likely relied on manuscript collation and historical verification to produce this edition
